title: Y@howyariyb #3080
definition:
Jehoiarib = "Jehovah contends"

 1) A priest in Jerusalem
 2) the head of the 1st of the 24 courses of priests in David's time
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jehoiarib = "Jehovah contends"

 1) A priest in Jerusalem
 2) the head of the 1st of the 24 courses of priests in David's time

    NASB:  the LORD contends, two Isr., also a priestly family
